sentences.target: Die Eröffnung ist heute um neun.

translations.de: Die Eröffnung ist heute um neun.
translations.en: The opening is today at nine.
translations.es: La inauguración es hoy a las nueve.
translations.fr: L’inauguration a lieu aujourd’hui à neuf heures.
translations.pt: A inauguração é hoje às nove.
translations.vi: Hôm nay khai trương lúc chín giờ.
translations.nl: De opening is vandaag om negen uur.
translations.el: Τα εγκαίνια είναι σήμερα στις εννέα.
translations.nb: Åpningen er i dag klokken ni.
translations.sv: Invigningen är i dag klockan nio.
translations.ro: Deschiderea are loc astăzi la ora nouă.
translations.da: Åbningen er i dag klokken ni.

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine, marking the subject.
Feminine noun meaning ‘opening/inauguration’; serves as the subject.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present, linking the subject to temporal complements.
Temporal adverb specifying the day.
Preposition used for clock times; governs accusative.
Cardinal numeral functioning as a time complement (‘um neun [Uhr]’).

sentences.target: Wir gehen zur Eröffnung ins neue Café.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈɡeːən tsuʁ ɛʁˈœfnʊŋ ɪns ˈnɔʏə kaˈfeː/

translations.de: Wir gehen zur Eröffnung ins neue Café.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈɡeːən tsuʁ ɛʁˈœfnʊŋ ɪns ˈnɔʏə kaˈfeː/
translations.en: We’re going to the opening at the new café.
translations.es: Vamos a la inauguración del nuevo café.
translations.fr: On va à l’inauguration du nouveau café.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要去新咖啡馆的开业活动。
translations.yue: 我哋去新咖啡店嘅開張儀式。
translations.ru: Мы идём на открытие нового кафе.
translations.pt: Vamos à inauguração da nova cafeteria.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לפתיחה של בית הקפה החדש.
translations.vi: Bọn mình đi dự lễ khai trương quán cà phê mới.
translations.ar: نحن ذاهبون إلى افتتاح المقهى الجديد.
translations.nl: We gaan naar de opening van het nieuwe café.
translations.uk: Ми йдемо на відкриття нового кафе.
translations.hi: हम नए कैफ़े के उद्घाटन में जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Πάμε στα εγκαίνια του νέου καφέ.
translations.nb: Vi skal på åpningen av den nye kaféen.
translations.id: Kami akan pergi ke pembukaan kafe baru.
translations.sv: Vi ska gå på invigningen av det nya kaféet.
translations.da: Vi skal til åbningen af den nye café.
translations.ja: 新しいカフェのオープンに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative, the subject.
Main verb; finite present (1st plural), expressing motion.
Contraction of ‘zu der’; preposition governing dative, indicating destination.
Feminine noun; dative object of ‘zu’.
Contraction of ‘in das’; marks motion into.
Attributive adjective; agrees with ‘Café’ (accusative singular neuter).
Neuter noun; object of ‘in’, destination.

sentences.target: Ich verpasse die Eröffnung heute leider.

translations.de: Ich verpasse die Eröffnung heute leider.
translations.en: I’ll miss the opening today, unfortunately.
translations.es: Lamentablemente, hoy me perderé la inauguración.
translations.fr: Malheureusement, je vais rater l’inauguration aujourd’hui.
translations.ko: 아쉽게도 오늘 개점 행사에 못 가요.
translations.zh-Hans: 可惜我今天赶不上开业活动。
translations.yue: 可惜我今日趕唔切開張。
translations.ru: К сожалению, сегодня я пропущу открытие.
translations.pt: Infelizmente, vou perder a inauguração hoje.
translations.he: לצערי, אני אפספס את הפתיחה היום.
translations.vi: Tiếc là hôm nay tôi sẽ lỡ lễ khai trương.
translations.nl: Helaas mis ik de opening vandaag.
translations.uk: На жаль, сьогодні я пропущу відкриття.
translations.hi: अफसोस, मैं आज उद्घाटन में नहीं जा पाऊँगा.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς, σήμερα θα χάσω τα εγκαίνια.
translations.nb: Dessverre går jeg glipp av åpningen i dag.
translations.id: Sayangnya, hari ini saya akan melewatkan pembukaan.
translations.sv: Tyvärr missar jag invigningen i dag.
translations.ro: Din păcate, astăzi voi rata deschiderea.
translations.da: Desværre går jeg glip af åbningen i dag.
translations.ja: 残念ですが今日は開店に行けません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative, the subject.
Main verb; 1st person singular present, taking a direct object.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine, marking the direct object.
Feminine noun; direct object of ‘verpassen’.
Temporal adverb specifying when the event occurs.
Sentential adverb expressing regret.

sentences.target: Die Eröffnung war gut besucht und schön.
sentences.reading: /diː ɛʁˈœfnʊŋ vaːʁ ɡuːt bəˈzuːxt ʊnt ʃøːn/

translations.de: Die Eröffnung war gut besucht und schön.
translations.ipa: /diː ɛʁˈœfnʊŋ vaːʁ ɡuːt bəˈzuːxt ʊnt ʃøːn/
translations.en: The opening was crowded and nice.
translations.es: La inauguración estuvo concurrida y agradable.
translations.zh-Hans: 开业活动人很多，也挺好。
translations.pt: A inauguração estava lotada e foi agradável.
translations.vi: Buổi khai trương đông và vui.
translations.nl: De opening was druk en gezellig.
translations.hu: A megnyitó zsúfolt és kellemes volt.
translations.hi: उद्घाटन भीड़भाड़ वाला था और अच्छा था.
translations.el: Τα εγκαίνια ήταν γεμάτα κόσμο και ωραία.
translations.nb: Åpningen var full av folk og hyggelig.
translations.sv: Invigningen var full av folk och trevlig.
translations.ro: Deschiderea a fost aglomerată și plăcută.
translations.cs: Otevření bylo plné lidí a příjemné.
translations.da: Åbningen var fyldt med folk og hyggelig.
translations.fi: Avajaisissa oli paljon väkeä ja oli mukavaa.
translations.ja: 開店は人が多くて、よかったです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine, marking the subject.
Feminine noun serving as the subject.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular preterite.
Adverb modifying the participle ‘besucht’ to indicate degree.
Past participle of ‘besuchen’, used predicatively as part of complement ‘gut besucht’.
Coordinating conjunction linking predicates.
Predicative adjective; part of the subject complement.

Die Eröffnung war gut besucht und schön.

We’re going to the opening at the new café.
